name: IGL_locus_chr22
description: Immunoglobulin lambda light chain locus on chr22q11.2, ~1.05 Mb. Contains ~30 functional Vλ genes (and ~33 pseudogenes) organised in three clusters (A, B, C) by phylogeny, plus 7 J-C tandem units (IGLJ1-IGLC1 ... IGLJ7-IGLC7) of which 4 (Cλ1, Cλ2, Cλ3, Cλ7) encode functional constant regions. V-J joining without D segments. The seven J-C cassettes share 95-99% identity and produce strong paralog-family signal across ~50 kb at the 3' end of the locus.
expected_copy_count: 1 per haplotype; 7 J-C cassettes with 4 functional Cλ paralogs at 95-99% identity
